description_long: This is a sleek, single-engine airplane with a streamlined black fuselage and a low-wing configuration. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit is positioned forward with a clear, enclosed canopy and visible side windows. The tail features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with a nose wheel and two main wheels under the wings. The overall appearance is modern and compact, suitable for general aviation or private use. The surface finish is smooth and glossy, with minimal visible markings or color variation.
description: A modern, black, single-engine low-wing airplane with a forward cockpit, tricycle landing gear, and a conventional tail. The surface is smooth and glossy, giving it a sleek appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the low-mounted wing, the propeller at the nose, and the cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, nose wheel, and the symmetrical low-wing span.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the tail, wing, and cockpit from the other side.
description_view_3: Head-on view displaying the propeller, cockpit canopy, and the full wingspan with landing gear visible beneath the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with one nose wheel and two main wheels, fixed and non-retractable.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with side windows and a clear canopy.
